name.description: Name of the API project to generate
name.x-prompt: What name would you like your API to have? i.e: MyApi

integrationPattern.description: How API Gateway integrations are generated for the API. Choose between isolated (default) and shared.

x-prompt.message: How would you like to map integrations to your FastAPI operations?

items.label: shared (single default integration with optional overrides)

auth.description: The method used to authenticate with your API. Choose between iam (default), cognito or custom.
auth.x-prompt: How would you like users to authenticate with your API?

directory.description: The directory to store the application in.
directory.x-prompt: Which directory do you want to create the project in?

subDirectory.description: The sub directory the project is placed in. By default this is the project name.
subDirectory.x-prompt: Which sub directory do you want to create the project in? (By default this is the project name)

iac.description: The preferred IaC provider. By default this is inherited from your initial selection.
iac.x-prompt: Which provider would you like to manage your infrastructure? (default: inherit)

infra.description: The type of infrastructure to use to deploy this API.
infra.x-prompt: What infrastructure would you like to deploy your API with?

preferInstallDependencies.description: Whether to prefer installing dependencies after the generator runs. Set to false to defer installing when batching multiple generators (an install still runs if needed so subsequent generators can compute the Nx project graph); install once at the end.
